arbin_bt2000.label: Arbin BT2000
notes: Good general-purpose cycler for multi-sample baseline work.
Use extra temperature channels when sample count exceeds 4.

biologic_bcs815.label: BioLogic BCS-815
notes: Useful for pulse work where faster logging matters.
Channel count is lower, so replicate planning matters.

maccor_series4000.label: Maccor Series 4000
notes: Higher current headroom supports aggressive rate ladders and pack-facing demos.
Confirm rack-specific channel allocation before launching multi-string work.

neware_bts4000_5v6a_8ch.label: Neware BTS4000-5V6A-8CH
notes: Eight-channel low-voltage Neware rack for throughput-oriented small-cell ageing and screening.
Treat the 5 V ceiling, 6 A ceiling, 30 W per-channel limit, and 500 ms minimum pulse width together.

neware_ct4008_5v30a_na.label: Neware CT-4008-5V30A-NA
notes: Eight-channel Neware platform for medium- to high-current single-cell work within 5 V / 30 A / 150 W per channel.
Treat the 5 V ceiling, 30 A current range, 150 W per-channel rating, and 500 ms minimum pulse width as hard planning bounds.

neware_bts4000_100v60a_1ch.label: Neware BTS4000-100V60A-1CH
notes: Single-channel high-power Neware system for pack, module, or large-cell work within a 100 V / 60 A / 6000 W envelope.
Treat the 500 ms minimum pulse width and the pulse-disabled parallel mode above 100 A as hard constraints.

iviumstat2h_datasheet.label: Ivium Technologies IviumStat2.h
notes: Four-electrode potentiostat/galvanostat with integrated FRA for EIS.
Recommended amplitude for battery EIS: 5 mV rms. Keep below 10 mV to stay in the linear regime.
Run EIS at open-circuit condition after sufficient rest. Do not disconnect cell between RPT and EIS steps to avoid contact-resistance artefacts.
Minimize lead inductance: keep cables short, use four-wire Kelvin connection, and subtract lead contribution at reference.

binder_lit_mk.label: BINDER LIT MK 240 / 720
startup_requirements: Switch on gas detection and allow about 5 minutes for initialization.
Confirm the CO2 cylinder, coil connector, and valve path before operation.
Verify the measuring and dilution gas ratio remains 1:1.
Check any operator-provided inertization or exhaust connection before release.
not_permitted: abuse testing or deliberate destructive testing
deeply discharged or mechanically damaged cells
notes: This chamber is a battery-test chamber with integrated safety systems, not a generic explosion-protected oven.
For EUCAR 4-6 work, the manual only permits individual cells and the defined-load envelope unless additional operator inertization is approved.
The temperature-performance data are specified for an unloaded chamber at about 22 C ambient.
